action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved to 542.52 (val 544.2) after fixing padding (replicate lat + circular lon), scaling to 160ch/10blk ResNet (~5M params), 20 epochs, stride=4; loss drops fast to ~0.05 then plateaus, steady val gains. Analysis: model respects periodicity now but loss (uniform MSE on norm data) not aligned with lat-weighted Z500 RMSE metric; under-using train data (stride=4); capacity can scale further without OOM. Decision: incremental update - add lat-weighted MSE loss (cos(lat) weights applied to both channels) to align train/val, increase to hidden=192/num_blocks=12 (~9M params), stride=2 (more data), bs_train=48, epochs=25 (with grad clip, lr=2.5e-4, cosine T=25); update model default, keep predict.py; this should yield lower RMSE while measuring ~30-40min iter time.
